The '''Coruscani Pilot Institute''', abbreviated as '''CPI''', was an [[academy]] located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], specializing in the training of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]].

CPI was a three-year course that preceded a one-year enrollment in the [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]] system. At least the top cadets in each year went on to the specialized [[TIE pilot]] training course on [[Carida/Legends|Carida]], and the Institute was prestigious enough to attract recruits from as far away as the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. It commonly trained the children of famous military families.<ref name="Handbook">''[[Star Wars: Imperial Handbook: A Commander's Guide]]''</ref>

In the early stages of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Commander/Legends|commandant]] of the CPI was [[Mogurk]]. [[Lumiya|Shira Brie]] and [[Myrette Davani]] studied there from [[4 BBY/Legends|3.5 BBY]] until [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]], finishing first and second in their class respectively.
